title: AgentRevocationRecord (v1)
description: One signed agent de-listing / reinstatement. Signed by `relay_public_key` over canonicalJson of every field except `hash`/`suite`/`signature`. De-list, not de-identify — the agent's identity, key, and receipts remain valid. See spec/agent-revocation-v1.md.

revoked.description: Resulting state: `true` = de-listed from Discover, `false` = reinstated.

reason.description: Categorized reason (`AgentRevocationReason`). `reinstated` accompanies a reinstatement (`revoked: false`).

actor.description: Who performed the change. `operator` = master-token hygiene; `self` = the agent itself.

note.description: Optional free-text operator note. Not a substitute for `reason`.

effective_at.description: Epoch milliseconds when the change took effect.

relay_public_key.description: Hex-encoded Ed25519 public key (32 bytes / 64 chars) — the trust anchor.

hash.description: Hex-encoded SHA-256 of `canonicalJson` of the signed payload.

signature.description: Hex-encoded Ed25519 signature over the canonical-JSON signed payload.
